**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Triggering the heavy equipment physical limitation and '4-person high-altitude industrial design/import-export shell' demotion probe. The extremely absurd Apple multinational OEM empire template in the original data has been physically pulverized. This enterprise, formerly named 'Fanhai Information Technology' and now renamed 'Fanhai Industrial Technology,' holds a business license that is a rhapsody challenging the bottom line of heavy industry: extending all the way from 'intelligent basic manufacturing equipment manufacturing' to 'manufacturing of special equipment for oil refining and chemical production.' The official system was intimidated by this series of heavy-industry words and categorized it as 'Electronic Device Manufacturing.' However, the forensic logic engine directly intercepted its fatal flaw: the insured headcount is a mere 4 people! The paid-in capital is only 1 million. Even more devastating are its spatial coordinates: 'Room 1109, Building 3, No. 30 Fengzhan Road, Yuhuatai District.' The logical deduction instantly turns into an extremely cold physical trial: in an 11th-floor office, 4 employees holding 1 million in capital claim to have built a super production line capable of producing 'special equipment for oil refining and chemical heavy equipment'? This is no longer ordinary license padding; this is a crazy friction against the modern petrochemical industry and the science of floor load-bearing. The probe mercilessly deleted all fictional narratives related to 'manufacturing,' and combining the 'industrial design services' and 'goods/import-export agency' at the beginning of its license, extracted its only true commercial logic: 'industrial design, technical consulting; import, export, and sales of various electrical/security/environmental protection equipment.' The truth is extremely clear: this is a 100% pure 4-Employee High-Rise Industrial Design & Equipment Export Broker. The boss is likely a tech-savvy industrial designer or a foreign trade veteran, leading 3 salespersons taking orders on the 11th floor: either helping factories draw blueprints and provide solutions (industrial design), or acting as a middleman, reselling chemical and environmental protection equipment or electronic components produced by other domestic factories overseas (import/export agency). The official 'heavy industry manufacturing' tag is a severe misjudgment of its true 'asset-light technical foreign trade' attribute.
